ability_3_summary: Triple attack speed for a short time.
ability_10_summary: Covers a large area in a deadly rain of arrows.

ability_3_summary: Hurls a flask of flammable liquid, burning Bloons that pass through the fire.
ability_10_summary: Sets the whole screen alight, burning all Bloons and granting the Heat It Up buff to all Monkeys.

ability_3_summary: Shoots a guided shell following target priority, stunning whatever Bloon it hits.
ability_10_summary: Resets cooldown on all Bomb Shooters and Mortar Monkeys.

ability_3_summary: Creates a spiked bush on the track that can pop 50 bloons. Lasts multiple rounds if not destroyed.
ability_10_summary: Summons a wall of trees across the track that destroy all Bloons that enter. When full, the trees burst into money.

ability_3_summary: Shots can pop Black Bloons and do extra damage to Ceramic Bloons. Duration increases as Churchill levels.
ability_10_summary: Launches a barrage of shells at up to 10 MOAB-class Bloons on screen, dealing massive damage each time.

ability_3_summary: 4 closest Monkeys pop an extra layer per attack for 6 seconds. Affected Monkeys can't attack for 2 seconds after effect ends.
ability_10_summary: Downgrades most newly spawned Bloons by 1 rank. Cash per pop from affected Bloons is double. Lasts 10 seconds.

ability_3_summary: slow Bloons, allow Purple popping and prevents any regrow from happening for 10 seconds.
ability_10_summary: places a curse on a MOAB-Class Bloon, it takes damage every second until annihilated.

ability_3_summary: All nearby Monkeys can pop +1 layer for a short time.
ability_10_summary: Grabs a MOAB, BFB, DDT (if visible), or ZOMG and crushes it to bits over 5 seconds.

ability_3_summary: Greatly increases attack range and power for a short time & damages all Bloon Types.
ability_10_summary: Brings forth a powerful ball of energy to strike down the Bloons.

ability_3_summary: greatly increases attack speed of Brickell and nearby water-based Monkeys for a short time.
ability_10_summary: deploys to any water area a devastating Mine that triggers on MOABs and stuns nearby Bloons. Mega Mines last 3 rounds.

ability_3_summary: Etienne launches 4 more temporary drones to wreak some Bloon popping havoc.
ability_10_summary: high altitude surveillance drone becomes devastating combat drone for a short time.

ability_3_summary: Sauda's dramatic Lead popping leap attack slams down on her targeted Bloons.
ability_10_summary: Sauda slides along the whole track, devastating Bloons as she goes.

ability_3_summary: Psi unleashes a wave of power that stuns nearby Bloons for a long time.
ability_10_summary: Psi unleashes a silent scream that throws the Bloons into utter chaos.

ability_3_summary: grants short term camo detection to a Monkey Tower or Hero. Geraldo's attack range increases.
ability_10_summary: aww what a cute widdle bunny wabbit!

ability_3_summary: Harvests nearby Bloons in an instant. Learns: Echo, Haste
ability_10_summary: Harvest a huge number of Bloons near Corvus. Trample does more damage to more Bloons. Learns: Recovery

ability_3_summary: Rosalia's workshop launches a missile that rains destruction from above.
ability_10_summary: Charge attaches to a Bloon, harnessing energy when the target takes damage. Then releases accumulated energy in a huge detonation.

ability_3_summary: Silas can hit all Bloons while active. When hitting frozen Bloons, target takes extra damage based on remaining freeze time.
ability_10_summary: Immediately freezes and damages all Bloons, dealing far more damage to already frozen Bloons. Then fills the track with Ice Walls.
